title: oenocarpus × andersonii
intro: Oenocarpus × andersonii, also known as the mountain soursop or mountain ash, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Oenocarpus, which is native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. The plant's leaves and seeds have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenocarpus × andersonii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The seeds are typically crushed and made into a tea or infused in oil for herbal preparations.
